parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id as client_id,
  c.name as client_name,
  nf.category,
  nf.cwe_id,
  nf.owasp_category,
  COUNT(nf.id) as occurrence_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT nf.engagement_id) as engagement_count,
  MIN(nf.first_seen) as first_seen,
  MAX(nf.last_seen) as last_seen,
  AVG(nf.recon_score) as avg_score,
  COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.remediation_status = 'verified_fixed') as times_fixed,
  COUNT(nf.id) FILTER (WHERE nf.reopen_count > 0) as times_reopened
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN engagements e ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
WHERE nf.validation_status IN ('validated','analyst_reviewed','verified_fixed')
  AND nf.cwe_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, nf.category, nf.cwe_id, nf.owasp_category
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT nf.engagement_id) >= 1
ORDER BY c.id, occurrence_count DESC;

parameters.jsCode:
const patterns = $input.first().json.patterns;
return patterns.map(p => ({ json: p }));

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO weakness_patterns (
  client_id, category, cwe_id, owasp_category,
  occurrence_count, engagement_count, first_seen, last_seen,
  pattern_type, narrative, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.cwe_id }}',
  {{ $json.owasp_category ? "'" + $json.owasp_category + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.occurrence_count }},
  {{ $json.engagement_count }},
  '{{ $json.first_seen }}'::timestamptz,
  '{{ $json.last_seen }}'::timestamptz,
  '{{ $json.pattern_type }}',
  '{{ $json.narrative.replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (client_id, cwe_id) DO UPDATE SET
  occurrence_count = EXCLUDED.occurrence_count,
  engagement_count = EXCLUDED.engagement_count,
  last_seen = EXCLUDED.last_seen,
  pattern_type = EXCLUDED.pattern_type,
  narrative = EXCLUDED.narrative,
  updated_at = NOW();

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Analyze Weakness Patterns').first().json.slack_summary, username: 'RECON OS Heatmap', icon_emoji: ':fire:' }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, payload)
VALUES ('heatmap_updated','wf22','{"patterns_updated":{{ $('Analyze Weakness Patterns').first().json.total }},"systemic":{{ $('Analyze Weakness Patterns').first().json.systemic_count }}}'::jsonb);

meta.description: RECON OS WF-22: Weakness Heatmap — weekly cross-engagement analysis detecting systemic, recurring, and emerging weakness patterns per client. Classifies patterns, generates narratives, Slacks summary.
